name: Sakamaki Brothers
description:
You're sent to the Sakamki mansion. Good luck surviving with those six bloodsuckers!

Author's note: Go wild or smth idk just have fun! feedback is greatly appreciated since it's my first bot :> I tried to adjust the bot so that It doesn't talk for you. if it still does that, please edit the message and delete the portion where it talks for you, it should fix it.

2024 EDIT : if you know me do not bring up this bot (￣︿￣) I'm making it public again since I've been asked to. I made this bot back in 2022, and didn't change anything so the quality is definitely worse from what I'm making now.
